text:
SHORT NAME: PROD_RPLCMT_LIFECYC_SW 

LONG NAME: PROD_RPLCMT_LIFECYC_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: Y = Yes, product replaced early/within product lifecycle 
N = No, product not replaced early (or not applicable) 

COMMENT: If any claim that comprises the Stay has a condition code (CLM-RLT-COND-CD) equal to '49' then the 
MEDPAR Product Replacement within Product Lifecycle Switch = 'Y'. If no '49' condition code, then this 
field ='N'. 

This field is new in 2011. 
 ^ Back
